CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Garret L. Wong; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
